title: Pirates O' Plenty
description: A modern pirate pack with a vibrant fantasy style! Awesome visuals without shaders, Immersive combat and in game lore! - Still in alpha and active development.
body:
![Big Bold Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a25a552958b270e4d7c131b9029c8ccd9c28346c.png)

## Important manual adjustments!
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
- Set your graphics to fabulous to ensure all the recource packs will work.
 
- Download the physics mod pro in order to get the oceans you see in the screenshots.
It is free, you can download it on the creators patreon make sure you install the correct version (1.20.1 forge). Dowload link: https://www.patreon.com/Haubna.
I recommend changing the physics mod pro settings to your liking before joining a world.

- Pirates o' Plenty uses first person model in combination with several other camera mods. This can feel very trippy at first but I higly recommand to give yourself some time to get used to it. Because once you do, the gameplay and especially the combat will feel a lot more immersive. Also, these camera features will make combat more chaotic to increase the games difficulty, disabling the first person model might make the game too easy for your liking. But if you really dont like it or get dizzy from using it, you can disable it in esc>mods>first person model>disable mod or delete the mod from the mod list.

### **And even more important:**
- _Enable pirate speak as language._

</details>

## Featuring:

### - **Pirate ships.** 
  Create a small ship and use it to get a bigger ship!

### - **Overhauled world gen.** 
  Vast oceans with small islands and large continents. This modpack offers no new biomes as 
  those are not neccesarry with the beatifull overhauled vanilla biomes from a super 
  underrated datapack called aboria.
   
### - **Modern visuals.** 
  Because this pack is on version 1.20.1, it offers awesome immersive and visual enchancements 
  that older versions don't have.
  
### - **Immersive gameplay.** 
  Several sound and particle enhancements creating a satisfying gameplay.
  
### - **Immersive combat.**  
  Your camera will tilt as you fight and you'll feel every strike you make and take!

### - **Expanded progression.** 
  More ways to upgrade your items. Though you might not need that when you have cannons on
  your ship...

### - **Built for low end hardware.** 
  Uses several performance mods and smart visual enhancements to create a modpack that even my 
  computer can run. Since my pc is a potato that has been fried after multiple
  years of GPU abuse, you should be able to run it as well. 

### - **In game guide and lore.** (still in development)
  All will be explained once you create a new world.

### - **Much more**
   I might have run out of things to write down. 

Check the screenshot, they will give you a much better idea of the pack than this tekst!

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Shaders are not supported but might be added soon if it is requested a lot. You could try to add oculus to get shaders but there might be bugs (I could not test this myself because my computer can't run shaders).

- Keep in mind that it is still in alpha and I not an experienced modder at all. Expect many bugs and just general low quality game design. 
  So be sure to let me know what you think of it! I'd love to hear suggestions and feedback or just your general thoughts on the pack. Dm me on curseforge (li_lela, (user_bxcnm580b6xu53n2)).

- If you are thinking about donating, please don't, there are far better things to donate than me. I recommend you consider donating to UNICEF or WFP.
